parameters.name: list_contacts
parameters.description: List recent HubSpot contacts (paginated).

parameters.name: search_contacts
parameters.description: Search contacts. Default matches 'email'; override via 'property' (firstname, lastname, phone, company, any property name) and 'operator' (EQ, NEQ, CONTAINS_TOKEN, GT, LT, HAS_PROPERTY).

parameters.name: get_contact
parameters.description: Get a contact by id or email.

parameters.name: create_contact
parameters.description: Create a new contact. At least email, firstname or lastname required.

parameters.name: update_contact
parameters.description: Update an existing contact by id.

parameters.name: delete_contact
parameters.description: Archive (soft-delete) a contact by id. Restorable within 90 days in HubSpot UI.

parameters.name: search_companies
parameters.description: Search companies. Default property 'name'; override via 'property' (domain, industry, country) and 'operator'.

parameters.name: get_company
parameters.description: Get a company by id.

parameters.name: create_company
parameters.description: Create a new company. Requires name or domain.

parameters.name: update_company
parameters.description: Update a company by id.

parameters.name: delete_company
parameters.description: Archive (soft-delete) a company.

parameters.name: list_deals
parameters.description: List recent deals.

parameters.name: search_deals
parameters.description: Search deals. Default property 'dealname'; override via 'property' (dealstage, amount, hubspot_owner_id, closedate) and 'operator' (EQ, GT, LT, CONTAINS_TOKEN, BETWEEN).

parameters.name: get_deal
parameters.description: Get a deal by id. Includes associated contacts and companies.

parameters.name: create_deal
parameters.description: Create a new deal. Requires dealname.

value.associated_contact_id: ={{ $fromAI('associated_contact_id', "Optional: associate with contact id on creation", 'string') }}
value.associated_company_id: ={{ $fromAI('associated_company_id', "Optional: associate with company id on creation", 'string') }}

schema.description: Close date (ISO date or unix ms)
Optional: associate with contact id on creation
Optional: associate with company id on creation

parameters.name: update_deal
parameters.description: Update a deal by id (move stage, update amount, change owner, etc.).

parameters.name: delete_deal
parameters.description: Archive (soft-delete) a deal.

parameters.name: search_tickets
parameters.description: Search tickets. Default property 'subject'; override via 'property' (hs_pipeline_stage, hs_ticket_priority, hubspot_owner_id) and 'operator'.

parameters.name: get_ticket
parameters.description: Get a ticket by id.

parameters.name: create_ticket
parameters.description: Create a new ticket. Requires subject.

value.subject: ={{ $fromAI('subject', "Ticket subject/title", 'string') }}
value.hs_pipeline_stage: ={{ $fromAI('hs_pipeline_stage', "Stage id (default: '1' = first stage of support pipeline)", 'string') }}

schema.description: Stage id (default: '1' = first stage of support pipeline)

parameters.name: update_ticket
parameters.description: Update a ticket (change stage, priority, assign owner).

parameters.name: delete_ticket
parameters.description: Archive (soft-delete) a ticket.

parameters.name: create_note
parameters.description: Create a note and optionally associate it with an object (contact, company, deal or ticket).

parameters.name: create_task
parameters.description: Create a task with due-date, priority and optional object attachment.

parameters.name: associate_objects
parameters.description: Associate two CRM objects via v4 default association. Types: contacts, companies, deals, tickets, notes, tasks.

parameters.name: list_associations
parameters.description: List objects of a given type associated with a source object.

parameters.name: list_pipelines
parameters.description: List pipelines and their stages for deals or tickets.

parameters.name: list_owners
parameters.description: List HubSpot users / owners (for hubspot_owner_id assignments).
